# MoleculeKit

> A Python library for reading, writing, and manipulating biomolecular structures and trajectories. Built around the `Molecule` class, with a full system-preparation pipeline (`systemPrepare`) that handles protonation at chosen pH, non-standard residues, custom residues from SMILES, mutation, and gap modeling.

## Tutorials

- [First molecule](tutorials/01-first-molecule.md): Load by RCSB ID, inspect, filter, write.
- [Atom selection](tutorials/02-atom-selection.md): VMD syntax and mask-based fast path.
- [System prep: basic protonation](tutorials/system-prep/01-basic-protonation.md): `systemPrepare` at chosen pH; the default 2-tuple `(mol_out, detect_specs)` return (3-tuple `(mol_out, detect_specs, details)` with `return_details=True`).
- [System prep: non-standard residues](tutorials/system-prep/02-non-standard-residues.md): `detectNonStandardResidues` + `systemPrepare(detect_specs=...)`.
- [System prep: custom residues from SMILES](tutorials/system-prep/03-custom-residues-from-smiles.md): `templateResidueFromSmiles` with `addHs=True`.
- [System prep: mutation, gap closing, segmentation](tutorials/system-prep/04-mutation-gap-closing-segmentation.md): `mutateResidue`, `model_gaps`, `autoSegment`.

## How-to guides

- [Read a structure](how-to/read-a-structure.md)
- [Write a structure](how-to/write-a-structure.md)

- [Append and merge molecules](how-to/append-and-merge-molecules.md)
- [Set and get properties](how-to/set-and-get-properties.md)
- [Guess bonds](how-to/guess-bonds.md)
- [Assign segments and chains](how-to/assign-segments-and-chains.md)
- [Wrap trajectories](how-to/wrap-trajectories.md)
- [Align structures](how-to/align-structures.md)
- [Compute distances and contacts](how-to/compute-distances-and-contacts.md)
- [Compute dihedrals](how-to/compute-dihedrals.md)
- [Compute RMSD and RMSF](how-to/compute-rmsd-rmsf.md)
- [Compute projections](how-to/compute-projections.md)
- [Compute protein-ligand interactions](how-to/compute-protein-ligand-interactions.md)
- [Convert a Molecule to RDKit or OpenFF](how-to/convert-to-rdkit-and-openff.md)
- [View a molecule](how-to/view-a-molecule.md)
- [Fetch from RCSB and OPM](how-to/fetch-from-rcsb-and-opm.md)

## Explanation

- [Molecule data model](explanation/molecule-data-model.md): per-atom arrays, `coords` shape, mutation semantics.
- [Atom-selection language](explanation/atom-selection-language.md): VMD syntax, distance operators, mask substitution rule.
- [Segments, chains, and bonds](explanation/segments-chains-and-bonds.md): PDB vs. MD conventions; topology vs. connectivity.
- [Trajectories and frames](explanation/trajectories-and-frames.md): multi-frame layout, periodic box, wrapping, trajectory formats.
- [System-preparation pipeline](explanation/system-preparation-pipeline.md): step-by-step what `systemPrepare` does and where each parameter intervenes.

## Reference

- [API index by topic](reference/index.md): autogenerated module docs grouped by Core / Atom selection / Geometry / Projections / Interactions / File formats / Tools / Visualization / External resources.

## Full corpus

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): concatenation of every doc page, generated at build time. Single-URL ingestion for retrieval pipelines.
